Hardscape Construction: Enhance your outdoors with stunning patios, walkways, and retaining walls. Water Features: Add a touch of tranquillity with ponds, fountains, or waterfalls. Irrigation Systems: Ensure your garden stays lush with efficient sprinkler systems and drip irrigation.

Design & Consultation Initial Consultation: We start by discussing your ideas, requirements, and budget, setting the foundation for a bespoke plan. Site Analysis: Our team evaluates your existing landscape to identify opportunities and any potential challenges. Custom Design: Enjoy tailored design plans that blend plant selection, hardscape elements, and layout perfectly suited to your property.

Gentle Washing: Depending on your roofing material, we employ either a soft wash or pressure wash to remove dirt, stains, and organic buildup. Minor Repairs: We don’t just clean – we also replace missing or damaged shingles as part of our comprehensive service. Post-Cleaning Assessment: After cleaning, we conduct a final inspection to evaluate your roof’s condition and recommend any necessary follow-up treatments.

2 _module_preset=default text_font_size=19px global_colors_info={}] At Antek’s Carpentry & Handyman Services , we prioritise your home’s structural integrity and curb appeal. Our specialised roof and gutter cleaning services are designed to protect your property from water damage and deterioration while enhancing its overall appearance.

Contact us today to discuss how we can make your landscaping dreams a reality. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 21. 2 _module_preset=default global_colors_info={}] [/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section]

Additional Offerings Fencing Solutions: We install and repair fences to add privacy and security. Soil Testing & Amendments: Enhance your soil’s health for improved plant growth. Drainage Systems: Tackle waterlogging or erosion with effective drainage solutions. Landscape Renovation: Revitalise your existing landscape with a complete makeover. We’re committed to delivering high-quality workmanship across all our services. Ready to create your ideal outdoor space.

Outdoor Lighting: Illuminate your space for added beauty and enhanced safety after dark. Maintenance Services Lawn Care: Regular mowing, fertilisation, and weed control keep your lawn looking its best. Tree & Shrub Care: Expert pruning, fertilisation, and health checks ensure your greenery thrives. Garden Upkeep: Ongoing weeding, planting, and mulching maintain a vibrant, healthy garden. Irrigation Checks: Routine inspections and repairs help optimise water use.

For optimal results, we recommend scheduling this service at least twice a year—especially if your home is surrounded by trees. Regular maintenance not only prevents costly water damage but also enhances your home’s visual appeal. Contact us today to schedule your premium roof and gutter cleaning service and ensure your home stays protected and looking its best. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 21.

Professional Recommendations: Should we find issues beyond routine cleaning, such as sagging gutters or corrosion, we offer expert advice for further repairs or replacements. Safety and Property Protection Fall Protection: Safety is paramount. Our professionals use safety harnesses and stabilising ladders to maintain a secure working environment. Property Safeguarding: We take every precaution to protect your property during the cleaning process, including covering plants and outdoor furniture.

Gutter Cleaning Debris Clearance: We meticulously remove leaves, twigs, and other obstructions to ensure your gutters function effectively. Detailed Inspection: Our experts inspect gutters and downspouts for signs of wear or damage. Flushing: We flush your gutters with water to verify smooth and efficient drainage. Sealant Application: Minor leaks are sealed promptly to extend the lifespan of your gutter system.

2 _module_preset=default text_font_size=19px global_colors_info={}] At Antek’s Carpentry & Handyman Services, we aim to be your first choice for all your handyman needs. With a comprehensive range of services and an unwavering commitment to customer satisfaction, here’s what you can expect when you choose us: Essential Services General Repairs: From patching walls to tightening fixtures and replacing doorknobs. Plumbing: Unclogging drains, fixing leaky pipes, and more.

Furniture Assembly: Handling the heavy lifting and complicated instructions for your new furniture. Outdoor Work: Fence repairs, gate installations, and basic landscaping. Drywall: Professional installation and repair of drywall and plaster. Insulation: Improve your home’s energy efficiency with our insulation services. Advanced Services Smart Home Set-Up: Installation and configuration of smart home devices. Energy Efficiency Consultations: Expert advice to make your home more energy-efficient.

Debris Removal: Our team carefully clears away leaves, branches, and other debris to create a clean surface. Moss & Algae Treatment: If moss, algae, or mildew are present, we use a targeted cleaning solution to safely eliminate these unwanted growths.

Electrical Work: Switch replacements, ceiling fan installations, and general electrical repairs. Painting: Professional interior and exterior painting, including wall preparation and touch-ups. Carpentry: Expert shelf installations, cabinet repairs, and custom woodwork. Appliance Installation: Efficient set-up for dishwashers, washing machines, and other appliances. Flooring: Specialising in laminate, hardwood, and tile repairs.

Cleanliness: We leave your home cleaner than we found it. Quality Assurance: Our work is backed by a satisfaction guarantee. Fully Licensed & Insured: Ensuring a worry-free service experience. Accessibility Upgrades: Installation of ramps, grab bars, and other accessibility features. Custom Solutions: Bespoke storage and organisation systems tailored to your needs. Roof & Gutter Maintenance: Keep your home in top condition with our cleaning and repair services. Our Commitments Transparent Pricing: No hidden fees – just honest, upfront pricing. Punctuality: We respect your time by always arriving promptly. Open Communication: We keep you informed every step of the way.

Window Frame Repairs: We repair or replace wooden window frames to ensure your windows not only look great but also function properly. Small Structures: From garden sheds to pergolas, we repair and maintain small outbuildings, ensuring they stand up to the elements. Painting & Staining: Our team preps and refines wood surfaces with quality painting and staining for a refreshed, lasting finish. Minor Adjustments: We fix sticking doors, squeaky floorboards, and loose handrails to keep your home operating smoothly. Why Choose Us. Whether its a quick fix or a detailed repair project, we’re here to ensure your home remains safe, functional, and beautiful. Ready to improve your home with professional carpentry repairs. Contact us today for a free estimate and let our handyman services bring new life to your space. [/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version=4. 21.

Furniture Assembly: Whether it’s assembling a new piece or repairing an existing one, we can help get your furniture up and running in no time. Exterior Carpentry Repairs & Enhancements Deck & Patio Maintenance: We handle repairs and maintenance for your outdoor decks and patios, keeping them safe and inviting. Fence Repairs: If your wooden fence or gate needs fixing, our expert team will restore its strength and curb appeal.

Flooring Repairs: Our team can mend or replace sections of hardwood, laminate, or engineered wood floors, so you can enjoy a smooth, safe surface. Stair & Handrail Repair: We fix loose or damaged staircases, balustrades, and handrails to keep your home secure. Plasterboard Repair: We patch holes, cracks, and other damage in plasterboard, ensuring a clean, finished look for your walls.

Our focus is on fixing, updating, and maintaining the woodwork in your property rather than undertaking full-scale builds. Interior Carpentry Repairs & Updates Cabinet & Shelving Fixes: We repair or install kitchen cabinets, built-in shelving, and storage solutions to help you make the most of your space. Trim & Door Work: From skirting boards and architrave to hanging interior doors and repairing door frames, we ensure every detail looks neat and functions properly.

--- home - Antek's Carpentry & Handyman Services ---
0431232608 antek@anteks. com.

With over 22 years of experience serving Sydneys Lower North Shore, our team of seasoned carpenters and skilled tradespeople is dedicated to transforming your property with unmatched precision and care. Whether you need property modifications, essential maintenance, or expert repairs, we deliver a comprehensive range of services from specialized carpentry to exterior soft washes and high-pressure cleaning.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Anteks Carpentry And Handyman — a Sydney-based company providing professional carpentry services including custom cabinetry, timber decking, door & window installation, kitchen renovations, bathroom renovations, pergolas, fencing, and general carpentry & maintenance.

Contact: Phone: +61 431 232 608 | Email: antek@anteks.com.au | Address: unit 5 upper/87 Reserve Rd, Artarmon NSW 2064, Australia | Website: https://www.anteks.com.au/
Service Area: Sydney, NSW & surrounding areas.

CRITICAL LANGUAGE RULE: You MUST respond ONLY in English. Use Australian English spelling and expressions (e.g. "colour" not "color", "organisation" not "organization", "no worries", "mate"). NEVER respond in any other language regardless of what language the user writes in. If a user writes in another language, respond in English and politely let them know you can only assist in English.

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on information provided in the knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly with a warm Australian tone
- If unsure, suggest contacting +61 431 232 608
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail is needed)
- Help visitors book services, get quotes, and learn about the company
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to Anteks Carpentry And Handyman! How can we help you today?
